commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed for contributor proof and PR-body tracking cleanup; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply on top of this branch.; Cleared: The diff only changes local JSONL transcript parsing and colocated tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, package, or external code-execution surface changes. (sha=8f5a01dbfdf1039cb05b9c97557ff4eedabb91b4)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes attempt-execution JSONL transcript parsing to evaluate assistant-after-latest-user over the recent transcript tail and adds sessionFileHasContent regression tests.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +37. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the helper returns true at the first assistant record and the fallback path uses that boolean for sessionHasHistory, so a user -> assistant -> fresh unanswered user JSONL transcript demonstrates the bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed for contributor proof and PR-body tracking cleanup; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply on top of this branch.

target.title: fix(agents): scope session-history guard to latest-user-answered
target.body:
Fixes #69086.

## Summary
- scope the session-history guard to assistant messages that occur after the latest user message
- preserve Claude CLI transcript support for `type: assistant` / `type: user` JSONL records as well as OpenClaw `type: message` records
- add a regression fixture where an earlier assistant response is followed by a fresh unanswered user message

## Test
- `pnpm test src/agents/command/attempt-execution.test.ts` — 35/35 passed


## Real behavior proof

Updated 2026-05-29 from a real macOS/OpenClaw checkout after Dallin Romney's rebase notice.

- Rebasing the PR branch onto current `openclaw/openclaw:main` succeeded cleanly.
- Current `main` still returns true on the first assistant record in the inspected transcript, so the guard bug is still present upstream.
- The PR now inspects the transcript tail rather than the first 500 records, so a fresh unanswered user turn after the old scan cap does not get misclassified as answered.
- Focused local verification passed on the rebased branch:
  - `pnpm test src/agents/command/attempt-execution.test.ts` → 36/36 passed
  - `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/command/attempt-execution.helpers.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.test.ts` → passed
- The broader command `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` did not reach code checks locally because this host's `crabbox` binary failed its own `--version/--help` sanity check (`selected binary failed basic --version/--help sanity checks`).

The added regression is the concrete after-fix proof for the prior review finding: an old user→assistant turn, 501 filler records, then a fresh unanswered user turn now returns `false`.
target.author: kenners22
